title: ToolBreak Warning
description: Displays a colored border on the tool when it has low durability
body:
A simple **resourse pack** that displays a colored border when the durability of a tool is low.

This works using 2 different variants of the minecraft textures, one with **Yellow Border** that displays when a tool has only 7% durability left, and one with **Red Border** that only gets displayed when the tool has 4% durability left. It is 

IMPORTANT: this resource pack can intervene with some other tool-changing resource packs.
